title: XmlFactory
description: AssetFactory implementation that loads XML files and produces a parsed Document via the browser's built-in DOMParser. Throws if the response body is not well-formed XML. Use the returned `Document` directly with standard DOM APIs — `doc.querySelector`, `doc.getElementsByTagName`, etc. — or pass it to a format-specific parser (e.g. for Tiled TMX, BMFont, or TexturePacker XML atlas files).

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: AssetFactory implementation that loads XML files and produces a parsed Document via the browser's built-in DOMParser.

Throws if the response body is not well-formed XML. Use the returned `Document` directly with standard DOM APIs — `doc.querySelector`, `doc.getElementsByTagName`, etc. — or pass it to a format-specific parser (e.g. for Tiled TMX, BMFont, or TexturePacker XML atlas files).

members.name: create
members.description: Parses the XML string into a Document. Throws if the browser's DOMParser reports a parse error (indicated by a <parsererror> element in the returned document).

members.name: createObjectUrl
members.description: Creates an object URL from blob and registers it for automatic cleanup when destroy is called. Prefer this over calling URL.createObjectURL directly inside a factory subclass so the URL is always tracked.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Revokes every object URL that was created via createObjectUrl and clears the internal tracking pool.

members.name: process
members.description: Reads the response body as a UTF-8 string containing the raw XML markup.

members.name: storageName
members.description: Identifier used as the object-store / storage-namespace key when this factory's assets are persisted to a CacheStore.
